name: Pumpkin Muffins (A&m)
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Arrowhead Mills Whole Wheat Pastry Flour
2 cups Pumpkin Puree (or 16 oz. canned pumpkin)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the dry ingredients: flour, wheat bran, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves, and salt (if using).
2. In a separate bowl, beat the eggs, then add the oil, honey, and pumpkin puree. Mix until well combined.
3. Pour the wet mixture into the dry mixture and stir until all ingredients are moistened.
4. Stir in the orange rind, raisins, and dates.
5. Fill prepared muffin tins about 2/3 full with the batter.
6. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes for large muffins or 20 minutes for mini-muffins.
7. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before removing from the pan.
(Yield: 24 large or 48 mini-muffins)
